---
name: Methodology Challenge
about: A substantive objection to the MMAD-EI methodology, protocol design, or theoretical framework
title: '[CHALLENGE] '
labels: methodology-challenge
assignees: ''
---

## The Claim Under Challenge

*Which specific claim, design decision, or theoretical position are you challenging?*

## The Strongest Version of the Objection

*State the objection in its strongest form. Not a "concern" — the strongest argument against the claim. If you can steelman the position you're challenging, do so first.*

## The Load-Bearing Assumption

*What assumption must be true for the challenged claim to hold? Is that assumption justified?*

## Evidence or Reasoning

*What evidence, literature, or reasoning supports the objection?*

## What Would Resolve It

*What would constitute a satisfactory response to this objection? What evidence or argument would change your assessment?*

---

*Methodology challenges are primary contributions. A challenge that forces an architectural rebuild is more valuable than an endorsement. That is the point.*
